violations.text: ROP imitation crab meat was observed defrosting in an intact ROP package. Product was tempted at 27 degrees F. Product was removed from packaging. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was emptied and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
The ceiling by the hood system area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024
The hood system was observed with an excess of debris. Hood systems must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Food Processor) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

The 3 bay sink in the establishment is not properly dispensing sanitizer. Sanitizer was measured at 0 PPM. Upon inspection the sanitizer is currently dispensing detergent. Establishment is to have 3 bay dispensers serviced. Sanitizing is occurring in dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk in blower, and behind the dishwasher have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
The how water faucet at the 3 bay sink is leaking. System must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
The floor in the walk in area, and below the dishwasher is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2024
